title: sparaxis liliago
intro: Sparaxis liliago, also known as the 'Barberton daisy', is a species of flowering plant in the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, Sparaxis liliago has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory conditions. Sparaxis liliago can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to promote relaxation and ease respiratory discomfort.
